summary: Testing completed for iteration 13 features: Super Admin Login, Dashboard, Changelog Modal, Password Visibility Toggle, Version Display. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working via Playwright.

backend_apis: GET /api/super-admin/dashboard - Dashboard loads with company data (200)
frontend_ui: Super Admin Login page (/admin-portal) loads correctly
Password visibility toggle (eye icon) works on Super Admin login
Version v1.0.0 displayed in footer of Super Admin login page
Super Admin login with valid credentials navigates to dashboard
Super Admin Dashboard loads with company statistics
Version button v1.0.0 visible in dashboard header
Changelog modal opens when clicking version button
Changelog modal shows 'Historial de Cambios' title
Changelog modal shows v1.0.0 'Lanzamiento Inicial en Producción'
Navigation buttons (Tickets, Server Config, Subscriptions, Create Company) visible
Password visibility toggle works on Company login
Version v1.0.0 displayed in footer of Company login page
Company logo displays correctly with base64 data URL

super_admin_login.details: Login form with email, password, password visibility toggle, and version display

password_visibility_toggle.details: Eye icon toggles password field between 'password' and 'text' type

changelog_modal.trigger: Click on v1.0.0 button in Super Admin dashboard header
changelog_modal.content: Shows 'Lanzamiento Inicial en Producción' with feature list

features: Navigation to Tickets, Server Config, Subscriptions, etc.

critical_code_review_comments: Password visibility toggle correctly implemented with Eye/EyeOff icons from lucide-react
Version constant APP_VERSION='1.0.0' properly exported from AppVersion.js
ChangelogModal component properly displays version history with feature badges
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Company logo correctly handles both logo_url and logo_file (base64) cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 features fully verified: (1) Super Admin login at /admin-portal with password visibility toggle (eye icon) working correctly. (2) Version v1.0.0 displayed in login footer and dashboard header button. (3) Changelog modal opens when clicking version button, shows 'Lanzamiento Inicial en Producción' with feature list. (4) Company login at /empresa/{slug}/login also has password visibility toggle working. (5) Favicon configured to use CIA logo from customer-assets. All backend APIs working correctly with proper authentication.

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All features use real database and API integrations.
